questions.question: As per the data on global military spending published by SIPRI, which country is the largest military spender in 2022?
questions.explanation: According to new data on global military spending published today by the Stockholm International Peace Research Institute (SIPRI), the United States, China and Russia are the three largest spenders in 2022. Total global military expenditure increased by 3.7 per cent in real terms in 2022, to reach a new high of USD 2240 billion. Military expenditure in Europe saw its steepest year-on-year increase in at least 30 years.

questions.question: Where was the Advantage Healthcare India (AHCI) 2023 conference held?
questions.explanation: Advantage Healthcare India (AHCI) is a leading event in South East Asia focused on the medical value travel industry. It is a 2-day event held at Pragathi Maidan, New Delhi at the side lines of G20 meetings. The aim of the event was to create a a platform for all important stakeholder groups across the health care industry, ensuring rich takeaways and immense learning and networking opportunities for all participants.

questions.question: Using which type of waves, the composition of Mars’s core composition has been predicted by NASA?
questions.explanation: Scientists of NASA have observed seismic waves traveling through Mars’ core for the first time, using which they have predicted the composition of the planet’s core. The seismic data was collected by the NASA InSight lander. The data reveals that, Mars core is filled with liquid iron-alloy core with high percentages of sulphur and oxygen.

questions.question: When is the ‘World Intellectual Property Day’ observed?
questions.explanation: The World Intellectual Property Day is observed every year on April 26. It raises global awareness about intellectual properties and their protection. The WIPO convention came into effect in 1970 and, in the year 2000, WIPO’s member states declared April 26 as World Intellectual Property.

questions.question: Which city is the host of the ‘QUAD Summit 2023’?
questions.explanation: The QUAD Summit 2023 will be organized in Sydney on May 24 this year. This summit will be the third in-person meeting between the leaders of QUAD countries. QUAD group includes the US, Australia, India and Japan. The first two Quad meetings were held in the US and Japan and this is the first time Australia will be hosting the meeting.

questions.question: India launched the ‘NET Zero’ Innovation Virtual Centre with which country?
questions.explanation: The India-UK ‘NET Zero’ Innovation Virtual Centre will be jointly created by the United Kingdom and India. It will help promote collaborations between stakeholders from India and the UK to work on focus areas like decarbonisation of manufacturing processes and transportation systems, green hydrogen adoption and more.

questions.question: What is the name of low-cost microphone designed to be used for recording underwater sound?
questions.explanation: Hydrophone is a low-cost microphone designed to be used for recording or listening to underwater sound. Researchers have used this instrument to record the sounds of marine organisms in coral reefs off the coast of south Goa to understand their behaviour.

questions.question: Which asteroid produces the annual Geminid meteor shower?
questions.explanation: Asteroid Phaethon, which was discovered in 1983, produces the annual Geminid meteor shower. New research has found that its close encounter with the Sun causes the vaporization of the sodium within the asteroid, resulting in comet-like activity.

questions.question: Anji Bridge, which was seen in the news, is being built in which state/UT?
questions.explanation: Anji Bridge is India’s first cable-stayed rail bridge. It is expected to be ready by May 2023. The bridge is a part of a 326-km rail line connecting Udhampur to Baramulla via Srinagar, which is an important connector between Kashmir and rest of India via railways.

questions.question: ‘Dimasa National Liberation Army’ is associated with which state?
questions.explanation: Dimasa National Liberation Army/Dimasa Peoples’ Supreme Council (DNLA/DPSC) entered into a tripartite Memorandum of Settlement with the Central Government and the Assam state Government. This insurgent group was founded to create a sovereign Independent Dimasa Nation.
